title: Incredibly Juicy Syrian Kabanos Kebabs
description: A flavorful Syrian dish featuring Polish kabanos, earthy spices, and a macrobiotic twist, perfect for adventurous eaters.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, pomegranate molasses, sumac, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced kabanos, chopped onion, bell pepper, and mushrooms to the bowl, tossing to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated ingredients onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the kabanos is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Let the kebabs rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Serve with a side of quinoa or brown rice for a macrobiotic-friendly meal.
